page: Amazon Web Services c8ine.12xlarge is a compute-optimized instance built on the x86_64 architecture. It features 48 virtual CPUs mapped to 24 physical Intel cores with hyperthreading enabled, running at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. The instance is allocated 96.0 GB of dedicated system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 2.0 GB. It operates on the AWS Nitro hypervisor, ensuring minimal virtualization overhead and dedicated resource allocation.

This instance does not include local NVMe storage, relying entirely on network-attached Elastic Block Store volumes. It is network and EBS optimized, offering a baseline network bandwidth of 75 Gbps to handle high-throughput data transfers and storage operations. The lack of local storage is a design tradeoff that prioritizes network-based storage flexibility and high-speed interconnects over local disk performance.

The c8ine.12xlarge is designed for compute-intensive workloads that benefit from high clock speeds and a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. The hardware profile is qualitatively cost-efficient for parallel processing tasks, high-performance computing, batch processing, and distributed analytics. It is not equipped with hardware accelerators, making it unsuitable for GPU-dependent machine learning training, but highly efficient for CPU-bound engineering simulations and web serving.
description: Amazon Web Services c8ine.12xlarge is a compute-optimized instance powered by 48 vCPUs and 24 physical Intel cores running at 3.9 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and managed by the AWS Nitro hypervisor, this instance provides 96.0 GB of dedicated memory, establishing a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. It features a baseline network bandwidth of 75 Gbps and is optimized for EBS and network performance, though it lacks local storage. The hardware profile is designed for compute-heavy workloads, offering qualitative cost efficiency for high-performance computing, batch processing, and distributed analytics. Without integrated GPUs or local NVMe drives, it is best suited for CPU-bound applications, scientific simulations, and high-throughput network tasks.
og_description: Amazon Web Services c8ine.12xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 48 Intel vCPUs, 96 GB of RAM, and 75 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for high-performance CPU-bound workloads.

tagline: A compute-optimized x86_64 instance featuring high-frequency Intel processors and high-speed network throughput for intensive parallel processing workloads.
